div.head: The Commissioner in Hungary (Grant-Smith) to the Secretary of State

opener.dateline:
Budapest, January 31, 1920—8 p.m.
[Received via Paris February 2—10:02 a.m.]

div.p: Respectfully recommend that General Bandholtz be sent home on State Department detail until he has had an opportunity of reporting personally to the Secretary of State at Washington on conditions in Hungary, also that he be accorded the usual diplomatic customs courtesies as retiring Commissioner of the United States in Hungary on arrival at New York.
